data.biography:
Aristotelis Savalas, dit Telly Savalas (Αριστοτέλης "Τέλλυ" Σαβάλας), né le 21 janvier 1922 à Garden City (État de New York) et mort le 22 janvier 1994 à Universal City (Californie), est un acteur et chanteur américain d'origine grecque.

Il est particulièrement connu pour avoir interprété dans les années 1970 le rôle principal dans la série télévisée policière Kojak. On l'a également vu dans un film de James Bond, Au service secret de Sa Majesté (1969), où il interprète le rôle d'Ernst Stavro Blofeld, et dans divers films à succès comme Les Douze Salopards (1967) ou De l'or pour les braves (1970).

Telly Savalas naît à Garden City dans l’État de New York, de parents immigrés grecs. Sa mère est originaire de Sparte.

Entre 1943 et 1946, il est militaire de carrière, travaillant pour le Département d'État des États-Unis. Il anime après la guerre des émissions pour l'armée américaine avec la série radio Your Voice of America sur ABC News. Il travaille ensuite comme journaliste pour cette entreprise.

Dans les années 1950, après avoir été un réalisateur de télévision reconnu, il commence une carrière de comédien en interprétant des rôles de truand, du fait de son physique expressif.

En 1961, le réalisateur John Frankenheimer offre à Telly Savalas son premier grand rôle dans le film Le Temps du châtiment, aux côtés de la star Burt Lancaster, où l'acteur incarne déjà le rôle d'un policier dans le quartier de Harlem. L'année d'après, Frankenheimer lui confie l'interprétation du prisonnier sadique dans Le Prisonnier d'Alcatraz, qui vaut à l'acteur une nomination pour l'Oscar du meilleur second rôle et une nomination aux Golden Globes.

En 1965, pour son rôle de Ponce Pilate dans La Plus Grande Histoire jamais contée de George Stevens, il doit se raser le crâne; par la suite, l'acteur conservera cette apparence.

En 1967, il interprète le rôle d'Archer Maggott dans Les Douze Salopards, un film d'action réalisé par Robert Aldrich. Il apparaît également en 1969 dans un James Bond, Au service secret de Sa Majesté, où il interprète le rôle d'Ernst Stavro Blofeld.

De 1973 à 1978, il connaît le succès en interprétant le rôle du lieutenant de police Theo Kojak dans la série télévisée Kojak.

Plus tard, il joue un rôle différent dans les deux suites télévisuelles, Les Douze Salopards: Mission Suicide (The Dirty Dozen: The Deadly Mission) en 1987 et dans Les Douze Salopards: Mission fatale (The Dirty Dozen: The Fatal Mission) en 1988.

Avant d'apparaître devant la caméra, Telly Savalas travaille comme réalisateur et producteur chez ABC. Alors qu'il supervise le programme Gillette Cavalcade of Sports, il embauche le journaliste Howard Cosell, donnant à l'animateur sportif légendaire son premier travail pour le petit écran.

En tant que producteur de la série Kojak, il donne leur première chance à nombre de futures stars. ...

Source: Article "Telly Savalas" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Aristotelis "Telly" Savalas (Garden City, New York, 1922. január 21. – Universal City, Kalifornia, 1994. január 22.) görög származású, Oscar-díjra jelölt és Emmy-díjas amerikai színész, énekes. Leghíresebb szerepét az 1970-es években vetített Kojak című televíziós sorozatban játszotta a címszereplő felügyelőként. 1963-ben a Filmakadémia Oscar-díjra jelölte Az alcatrazi ember (1962) című filmben nyújtott mellékszerepe alakításáért. A halál ötven órája (1965), majd A piszkos tizenkettő (1967) című filmekben is emlékezeteset alakított. Jennifer Aniston keresztapja.

Aristoteles "Telly" Savalas, (Garden City, Nova York, 21 de gener de 1922 - Universal City, Califòrnia, 22 de gener de 1994) va ser un actor de cinema i televisió estatunidenc. És recordat pel seu personatge Theo Kojak a la sèrie "Kojak", un dur i galant tinent de policia de Nova York conegut per la seva calvície intencionada i pels seus típics xupa-xups.

亚里士多德“泰利”萨瓦拉斯（希腊语：Αριστοτέλης “Τέλι” Σαββάλας;1922 年 1 月 21 日 - 1994 年 1 月 22 日）是美国影视演员和歌手，其职业生涯跨越了四十年。

萨瓦拉斯因在 1970 年代的犯罪剧《Kojak》中扮演主角而闻名，他因在《恶魔岛的鸟人》（1962 年）中的表演而获得奥斯卡最佳男配角奖提名。他的其他电影作品包括《年轻的野蛮人》（1961 年）、《有史以来最伟大的故事》（1965 年）、《突出部之战》（1965 年）、《肮脏的十二人》（1967 年）、《头皮猎人》（1968 年）、詹姆斯·邦德电影《女王陛下的特勤局》（1969 年）、凯利的英雄（1970 年）、《连续的漂亮女仆》（1971 年）、《由内而外》（1975 年）和《逃往雅典娜》（1979 年）。
data.name: 特利·萨瓦拉斯

data.biography:
亞裏士多德“泰利”薩瓦拉斯（希臘語：Αριστοτέλης “Τέλι” Σαββάλας; 1922 年 1 月 21 日 - 1994 年 1 月 22 日）是美國影視演員和歌手，其職業生涯跨越了四十年。

薩瓦拉斯因在 1970 年代的犯罪劇《Kojak》中扮演主角而聞名，他因在《惡魔島的鳥人》（1962 年）中的表演而獲得奧斯卡最佳男配角獎提名。他的其他電影作品包括《年輕的野蠻人》（1961 年）、《有史以來最偉大的故事》（1965 年）、《突出部之戰》（1965 年）、《骯髒的十二人》（1967 年）、《頭皮獵人》（1968 年）、佔士·邦電影《女王陛下的特勤局》（1969 年）、凱利的英雄（1970 年）、《聯續的漂亮女僕》（1971 年）、《由內而外》（1975 年）和《逃往雅典娜》（1979 年）。
data.name: 特利·薩瓦拉斯

data.biography: Aristotelis "Telly" Savalas (21 de enero de 1922 - 22 de enero de 1994) fue un actor y cantante estadounidense de cine y televisión, cuya carrera abarcó cuatro décadas. Mejor conocido por interpretar el papel principal en el drama criminal de la década de 1970 Kojak, Savalas fue nominado para un Premio de la Academia al Mejor Actor de Reparto por su actuación en Birdman of Alcatraz (1962). Sus otros créditos cinematográficos incluyen The Young Savages (1961), The Greatest Story Ever Told (1965), Battle of the Bulge (1965), The Dirty Dozen (1967), The Scalphunters (1968), el supervillano Ernst Stavro Blofeld en la película de James Bond On Her Majesty's Secret Service (1969), Kelly's Heroes (1970), Pretty Maids All in a Row (1971), Inside Out (1975) y Escape to Athena (1979).
data.name: Telly Savalas

data.biography:
Аристотелис „Тели“ Савалас (1922–1994) е американски актьор от гръцки произход, превърнал се в попкултурна икона благодарение на своя специфичен външен вид и харизматично присъствие.  Роден е на 21 януари 1922 г. в Ню Йорк в семейство на гръцки имигранти. До 18-годишна възраст говори предимно гръцки.

Военна служба: Служи в американската армия по време на Втората световна война (1941–1943), но е освободен след тежка автомобилна катастрофа.

Образование: Завършва психология в Колумбийския университет. Преди актьорската си кариера работи в Държавния департамент на САЩ и като изпълнителен продуцент в ABC News.  Актьорска кариера

Савалас започва да се снима в киното едва в края на 30-те си години.  Пробив в киното: Номиниран е за „Оскар“ за най-добра поддържаща мъжка роля за филма „Птицегледачът от Алкатрас“ (1962).

Емблематични роли:

Играе злодея Ернст Ставро Блофелд във филма за Джеймс Бонд „В тайна служба на Нейно Величество“ (1969).

Участва в класики като „Мръсната дузина“ (1967) и „Героите на Кели“ (1970).

„Коджак“ (1973–1978): Най-голямата му слава идва с ролята на лейтенант Тео Коджак. Образът му – плешив, с близалка в ръка и култовата фраза „Who loves ya, baby?“ – му носи награда „Еми“ и два Златни глобуса.  Женил се е три пъти и има шест деца. Той е кръстник на актрисата Дженифър Анистън.

Музика: Има успешна кариера и като певец, като неговата версия на песента „If“ достига първо място в класациите на Обединеното кралство през 1975 г..

Умира от рак на пикочния мехур и простатата на 22 януари 1994 г., ден след 72-рия си рожден ден.
data.name: Тели Савалас

data.biography:
Aristotelis "Telly" Savalas (21 gennaio 1922 – 22 gennaio 1994) è stato un attore e cantante americano di cinema e televisione la cui carriera si è estesa per quattro decenni.

Conosciuto soprattutto per aver interpretato il ruolo principale nel dramma poliziesco degli anni '70 Kojak, Savalas fu nominato all'Oscar come miglior attore non protagonista per la sua interpretazione in Birdman of Alcatraz (1962). Tra i suoi altri crediti cinematografici figurano The Young Savages (1961), The Greatest Story Ever Told (1965), Battle of the Bulge (1965), The Dirty Dozen (1967), The Scalphunters (1968), il supercriminale Ernst Stavro Blofeld nel film di James Bond On Her Majesty's Secret Service (1969), Kelly's Heroes (1970), Pretty Maids All in a Row (1971), Inside Out (1975) e Escape to Athena (1979).

Jorge Ernesto Guzmán Rodríguez is a Mexican luchador enmascarado, or masked professional wrestler and political activist, best known under the ring name, El Hijo del Santo ("The Son of the Saint"). Guzmán is the youngest child, out of eleven, of Rodolfo Guzmán Huerta, better known as El Santo, a professional wrestler, film actor, and Mexican folk hero. Jorge Guzmán's son made his debut under the name "Santo Jr.", the third-generation Guzmán to use the name "Santo". Jorge Guzmán's uncles, Miguel "Black" Guzmán, Jesús Guzmán (Pantera Negra) and Jimmy Guzmán were also wrestlers. Axxel, Jorge Guzmán's nephew, originally wrestled as "El Nieto del Santo" ("The Grandson of El Santo") but Jorge Guzmán owned the rights to the "Santo" name and objected. Guzmán has also followed in his father's footsteps, as he has starred in several lucha films. He made his wrestling debut in February 1982 under the name El Korak, but officially adopted his most famous ring name and silver mask in October 1982. During his career as Guzmán has worked for every major Mexican wrestling promotion including Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre, Asistencia Asesoría y Administración, Universal Wrestling Association and World Wrestling Association as well as stints with WWE in the United States as well as working in Japan for New Japan Pro-Wrestling, All Japan Pro-Wrestling and various other promotions. Early in his career he formed a successful tag team with Eddie Guerrero called "La Pareja Atomica", inspired by their fathers (El Santo and Gory Guerrero) teaming up from the 1940s to the 1960s. From 1998 through 2006 he also formed a very successful team with Negro Casas. Over the span of his career Guzmán has held various championships, most significantly the AAA World Tag Team Championship, Mexican National Middleweight Championship, Mexican National Trios Championship, Mexican National Welterweight Championship, CMLL World Tag Team Championship, UWA World Lightweight Championship, UWA World Welterweight Championship, WWA Tag Team Championship and WWA World Welterweight Championship as well as an honorary championship awarded by the World Boxing Council. He's also won the Leyenda de Plata tournament (held in honor of his father), the 1995 version of the CMLL International Gran Prix tournament and the 2004 Gran Alternativa tournament. In 1997 he was voted into the Wrestling Observer Newsletter Hall of Fame.
data.name: El Hijo del Santo

Торі Кіттлз (англ. Tory Kittles) — американський актор, відомий за ролями в телевізійних серіалах і фільмах. Народився 7 травня 1975 року в Лоуренс-Голлівуді, Флорида, США.

Рання життя та освіта

Торі Кіттлз виріс у Флориді, де він з раннього віку проявляв інтерес до акторської майстерності. Після закінчення школи він вступив до Флоридського університету, де продовжував розвивати свої акторські здібності.

Кар'єра

Кіттлз розпочав свою акторську кар'єру на початку 2000-х років, знімаючись у невеликих ролях у телевізійних шоу та фільмах. Його перша значна роль була у фільмі "Тигри жовті" (2000).

Однак справжнє визнання Торі Кіттлз отримав завдяки ролям у популярних телевізійних серіалах. Він знявся в таких шоу, як "Закон і порядок: Спеціальний корпус" (Law & Order: Special Victims Unit), "Справжній детектив" (True Detective), де його гра була високо оцінена критиками.

Крім того, Кіттлз з'явився у багатьох фільмах, таких як "Американська історія Х" (American History X), "Невідомий" (Unknown) і "Вітер змін" (The Wind That Shakes the Barley). Його здатність виконувати різноманітні ролі зробила його одним з найбільш затребуваних акторів свого покоління.

Особисте життя

Інформація про особисте життя Торі Кіттлза мало доступна, оскільки він тримає його приватним і не розкриває багато деталей про свою сім'ю або особисті стосунки.

Визнання та нагороди

Протягом своєї кар'єри Торі Кіттлз здобув численні нагороди і номінації за свою акторську майстерність. Його робота отримала високу оцінку як від критиків, так і від глядачів.

Висновок

Торі Кіттлз є талановитим актором, який зробив значний внесок у кіноіндустрію. Його різнопланові ролі та майстерність гри роблять його улюбленцем серед шанувальників та критиків.
data.name: Торі Кіттлз

Paudge Rodger Behan is an Irish actor and writer. The son of IRA Chief of Staff Cathal Goulding and Beatrice Behan, the widow of playwright Brendan Behan, Paudge Behan worked briefly as a journalist for a Dublin newspaper before turning to acting. After a series of minor film and television roles in the 1990s, he was handpicked by English novelist Barbara Taylor Bradford to appear as the male lead in a 1999 dramatisation of her book A Secret Affair (1996).

Behan has also appeared in the feature films A Man of No Importance (1994), Conspiracy of Silence (2003) and Veronica Guerin (2003), and has taken leading roles in two short films, A Lonely Sky (2006) and Wake Up (2007).
data.name: Paudge Behan

data.biography:
Toni Garrn wuchs in Hamburg, London und Athen auf. Als Model entdeckt wurde sie in Hamburg bei einem Fan-Fest zur Fußball-Weltmeisterschaft 2006. Der internationale Durchbruch gelang ihr im Jahr darauf, als sie exklusiv für Calvin Klein gebucht wurde. Nach ihrem Abitur bezog sie einen Wohnsitz in New York, um dort professionell als Model zu arbeiten.

Seit 2014 arbeitet Toni Garrn regelmäßig mit dem Schauspiel-Coach Bernhard Hiller.

Im selben Jahr spielte sie eine Nebenrolle in dem Independent Film „UNDER THE BED“ unter der Regie von Steven C. Miller.

Im Jahr 2015 übernahm sie eine Hauptrolle in dem Art Movie (Kurzfilm) „THE SHIFT“ unter der Regie von Mayk Azzato.

Toni Garrn engagiert sich seit 2014 als Botschafterin für die Kampagne „Because I am a Girl“ für das Kinderhilfswerk „Plan International“.

Seit Jahren ist sie als Co-Gastgeberin von Events wie z.B. „The Daily’s“ Fashion Media Awards oder „Maiyet Dinner“ auf der Art Basel, Miami, tätig. In ihrer Funktion als „Plan“-Botschafterin tritt sie immer wieder öffentlich auf, um auf die Missstände von jungen Frauen in Afrika aufmerksam zu machen.

data.biography: Lou de Laâge (Burdeos, 27 de abril de 1990) es una actriz francesa. Fue galardonada con el Premio Romy Schneider en 2016.

Lou de Laâge, née le 27 avril 1990 à Bordeaux, est une actrice française.

Née d'un père journaliste à Sud Ouest, Dominique de Laâge (1958-2018), et d'une mère peintre, elle passe sa jeunesse entre Bordeaux et Montendre (Charente-Maritime). Après un bac littéraire, elle intègre l'école de théâtre parisienne Claude Mathieu pour devenir actrice.

Elle fait ses débuts au cinéma en 2011 dans la comédie J'aime regarder les filles. Elle joue la jeune fille dont le héros, incarné par Pierre Niney, tombe amoureux. La même année, elle est la tête d'affiche du film à petit budget, Nino (une adolescence imaginaire de Nino Ferrer), écrit et réalisé par Thomas Bardinet.

En 2013, elle fait partie de la distribution de projets exposés immédiatement: le drame hippique Jappeloup, réalisé par Christian Duguay, écrit et interprété par Guillaume Canet. Elle y a aussi pour partenaires Marina Hands et Daniel Auteuil. Sa performance lui vaut d’être nommée meilleur espoir féminin lors des César 2014. Elle fait aussi partie du casting choral de la comédie dramatique Des gens qui s'embrassent, réalisée par Danièle Thompson.

En 2014, elle partage l'affiche du drame intimiste Respire, second long-métrage de Mélanie Laurent, avec Joséphine Japy. Cette fois, elle est nommée au César 2015 du meilleur espoir féminin.

En 2015, elle s'investit dans deux projets franco-italiens: elle partage l'affiche du drame indépendant Le Tournoi avec Michelangelo Passaniti, puis seconde Juliette Binoche, actrice principale de L'Attente, co-écrit et réalisé par Piero Messina.

L'année suivante, elle incarne l'héroïne du drame historique Les Innocentes, réalisé par Anne Fontaine. Elle remporte cette fois le Prix Romy-Schneider 2016. Elle reste dans le registre historique pour le drame portugais Le Cahier noir, réalisé par Valeria Sarmiento.

L'année 2019 est marquée par la sortie de la satire Blanche comme neige, nouveau projet d'Anne Fontaine. Elle y a pour principale partenaire Isabelle Huppert.

En juin de la même année, elle fait partie du jury de Sandrine Bonnaire lors du 33e Festival du film de Cabourg.

Source: Article "Lou de Laâge" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography: Anthony Boyle (born 8 June 1994) is an Irish actor. A graduate of Royal Welsh College of Music and Drama in Cardiff, Boyle began his acting career on London stage and rose to prominence for originating the role of Scorpius Malfoy in the West End and Broadway productions of the British play Harry Potter and the Cursed Child (2016), for which he won the Laurence Olivier Award for Best Actor in a Supporting Role and was nominated for the Tony Award for Best Featured Actor in a Play. He is also known for starring as Geoffrey Bache Smith in the film Tolkien and Alvin Levin in the mini-series The Plot Against America.
data.name: Anthony Boyle

data.biography: Anthony Boyle (* 8. Juni 1994 in Irland) ist ein irischer Schauspieler. Er ist auch bekannt als Geoffrey Bache Smith in dem Film Tolkien und als Alvin Levin in der Miniserie The Plot Against America.

安东尼·博伊尔（Anthony Boyle，1994年6月8日-），爱尔兰演员。博伊尔毕业于卡迪夫皇家威尔士音乐与戏剧学院，在伦敦舞台上开始了他的演艺生涯，并因在英国戏剧《哈利波特与被诅咒的孩子》（2016 年）的西区和百老汇制作中扮演斯科皮马尔福一角而声名鹊起，为此他获得了劳伦斯·奥利弗奖最佳男配角奖，并被提名为托尼奖最佳男主角在戏剧中。他还因在电影《托尔金》中饰演杰弗里·巴奇·史密斯和在迷你剧《反美阴谋》中饰演阿尔文·莱文而闻名。
data.name: 安东尼·博伊尔

Dans ve piyano eğitimleri aldıktan sonra balerin olmayı tercih etmiştir. Daha sonra eğitim hayatına Anadolu Üniversitesi İşletme Bölümünde devam ettirme kararı almıştır.

2014 yılında düzenlenen Elidor Miss Turkey yarışmasında 3.seçilerek dereceye girmiştir. Kariyerine oyuncu olarak devam etmeye karar veren Pusat, Medcezir dizisi ile oyunculuğa adım atmıştır. Başrollerini Serenay Sarıkaya ve Çağatay Ulusoy'un paylaştığı dizinin kadrosunda yer almıştır.

2017 yılına gelindiğinde Star TV ekranlarında yayınlanmaya devam eden dizide Doktor Bahar karakteri ile büyük çıkış yakalamıştır.

data.biography:
Aybüke Pusat (born 25 February 1995) is a Turkish actress, ballet dancer, model and beauty pageant titleholder who was crowned Miss Earth Turkey 2014 and was supposed to represent her country at the Miss Earth 2014 pageant. Her maternal family is of Tatar descent (a Turkic ethnic subgroup). She graduated from ballet department of Hacettepe University Ankara State Conservatory.

Pusat made her debut appearance in the popular TV series Medcezir as a supporting role in 2014. She then went on to play a series of supporting roles in comedy series Beş Kardeş (2015) and O Hayat Benim (2015–16). She rose to fame in 2017 for playing the headstrong, resilient female lead Dr. Bahar Kutlu in two seasons of Söz, one of Turkey's most popular and internationally acclaimed action drama, alongside Tolga Sarıtaş, who was nominated for an International Emmy Award (Best Performance by an Actor) for his role. In 2018, she went on to star in a leading role in Şahin Tepesi, an adaptation of the widely acclaimed US TV series Falcon Crest.

In 2019, she starred alongside Furkan Andıç in the romantic comedy Her Yerde Sen where she plays Selin Sever, a lively and intelligent interior architect who was forced to share a house with Andıç's character Demir Erendil, who was also her boss. Her Yerde Sen received international recognition and high praise after having won a Golden Lens Award from the Journalists' Association for its impeccable storytelling, directing, and cinematography.
data.name: Aybüke Pusat

Karn Kasidej Hongladaromp is a Thai actor, singer, and songwriter. He went to Suankularb Wittayalai School. He is currently studying at the Faculty of Music at Rangsit University. Furthermore, he was the winner of the 24th KPN singing contest. Kasidej is known for the series “The School” (2015) and “Views of Love: Grey Rainbow” (2016).

In 2021, he and his long-lost friend, Alyn Wee, formed a musical duo group called HYBS under JUICEY. They debuted with the song “Ride” and since then produced singles like “Dancing with my Phone” and “Go Higher” to name a few.

data.biography:
Joseph Harry Fowler Connick, Jr. (born September 11, 1967) is an American singer, actor, composer and pianist. Connick has sold over 25 million albums worldwide. He is ranked among the top 60 best-selling male artists in the United States by the Recording Industry Association of America, with 16 million certified albums. He has seven top-20 U.S. albums, and ten number-one U.S. jazz albums, earning more number-one albums than any other artist in the US jazz chart history.

Connick's best selling album in the United States is his 1993 Christmas album When My Heart Finds Christmas, which also is one of the best selling Christmas albums in the United States. His highest charting album, is his 2004 release Only You which reached #5 in the U.S. and #6 in Britain. He has won three Grammy awards and one Emmy Award. He played Grace's husband Dr. Leo Markus on the TV sitcom Will & Grace from 2002 to 2006.

Connick began his acting career as a tail gunner in the World War II film Memphis Belle in 1990. He played a serial killer in Copycat in 1995, before being cast as jet fighter pilot in the 1996 blockbuster Independence Day. Connick's first role as a leading man was in 1998's Hope Floats with Sandra Bullock. His first thriller film since Copycat came in 2007, when he played the violent ex-husband in Bug, before two romantic comedies, 2007's P.S. I Love You, and the leading man in New in Town with Renée Zellweger in 2009.

data.biography:
约瑟夫·哈里·福勒·康尼克（Joseph Harry Fowler Connick， Jr.，1967年9月11日-），美国歌手、演员、作曲家和钢琴家。Connick 已在全球售出超过 2500 万张专辑。他被美国唱片业协会评为美国最畅销的60位男艺人之一，拥有1600万张认证专辑。他有七张美国前 20 张专辑，十张美国爵士专辑排名第一，比美国爵士乐排行榜历史上任何其他艺术家都多。

康尼克在美国最畅销的专辑是他 1993 年的圣诞专辑《When My Heart Find Christmas》，这也是美国最畅销的圣诞专辑之一。他最高的排行榜专辑是他 2004 年发行的 Only You，在美国达到 #5，在英国达到 #6。他曾获得三项格莱美奖和一项艾美奖。2002年至2006年，他在电视情景喜剧《威尔与格蕾丝》中扮演格蕾丝的丈夫里奥·马库斯博士。

康尼克于 1990 年在二战电影《孟菲斯美女》中以尾炮手的身份开始了他的演艺生涯。他于 1995 年在 Copycat 中扮演连环杀手，然后在 1996 年的大片《独立日》中饰演喷气式战斗机飞行员。康尼克的第一个男主角是在 1998 年与桑德拉·布洛克 （Sandra Bullock） 合作的《希望漂浮》中。2007年，他在《Bug》中扮演暴力的前夫，之后是两部浪漫喜剧，2007年的《P.S.》上映后，他自《模仿者》以来的第一部惊悚电影问世。我爱你，以及 2009 年与蕾妮·齐薇格 （Renée Zellweger） 合作的《New in Town》中的男主角。
data.name: 小哈里·康尼克

data.biography:
Joseph Harry Fowler Connick Jr., dit Harry Connick Jr., est un acteur, producteur, pianiste, présentateur, chanteur et compositeur américain, né le 11 septembre 1967 à La Nouvelle-Orléans (Louisiane).

Joseph Harry Fowler Connick Jr. naît le 11 septembre 1967 à La Nouvelle-Orléans, en Louisiane. Son père, Harry Connick Sr., est district attorney (procureur) à La Nouvelle-Orléans, et sa mère, Anita Connick, est juge. Ils possèdent également un magasin de disques, ce qui explique l'intérêt du Harry pour la musique dès son plus jeune âge. À trois ans, il commence à jouer du piano et se produit publiquement pour la première fois à l'âge de six ans. À dix ans, il enregistre un disque avec un groupe de jazz professionnel. Il continue son éducation musicale au New Orleans Center For The Creative Arts, tout en se produisant dans des clubs et bars.

Alors qu'il n'a que 13 ans, sa mère décède d'un cancer, après plusieurs années de lutte contre la maladie.

À 18 ans, il s'installe à New York pour étudier, tout d'abord au Hunter College, puis à la Manhattan School of Music. Il rencontre alors George Butler, cadre chez Columbia, avec qui il signe un contrat.

En 1987, à 19 ans, Harry Connick Jr. sort un album de standards musicaux, qui reçoit les critiques très enthousiastes des plus grands noms du jazz.

En 1988, il sort un nouvel album 20, sur lequel il accompagne les morceaux musicaux de sa voix, contrairement au précédent.

Le réalisateur Rob Reiner l'appelle pour composer son film Quand Harry rencontre Sally (1989), avec Billy Crystal et Meg Ryan: il choisit plusieurs de ses chansons, et, une fois le film sorti, l'album devient rapidement double disque de platine. Son premier véritable grand succès lui permet de réaliser une tournée mondiale.

En 1990, il tient le rôle principal, celui du sergent Clay Busby, dans le film de guerre Memphis Belle de Michael Caton-Jones.

En 1995, il incarne Daryll Lee Cullum, le tueur en série, dans le thriller Copycat de Jon Amiel, terrorisant la psychiatre Helen Hudson (interprétée par Sigourney Weaver), aux côtés de Holly Hunter et Dermot Mulroney.

En 1996, il apparaît dans le rôle du capitaine Jimmy Wilder dans le film de science-fiction Independence Day de Roland Emmerich, aux côtés de Will Smith et Jeff Goldblum.

En 2002, à la télévision, il interprète Leo Markus, petit-ami et futur époux de Grace Adler pour le sitcom Will et Grace (Will & Grace), diffusé sur la chaîne NBC jusqu'en 2006.

Source: Article "Harry Connick Jr." de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

約瑟夫·哈里·福勒·康尼克（Joseph Harry Fowler Connick， Jr. ，1967 年 9 月 11 日-），美國歌手、演員、作曲家和鋼琴家。Connick 已在全球售出超過 2500 萬張專輯。他被美國唱片業協會評為美國最暢銷的 60 位男藝人之一，擁有 1600 萬張認證專輯。他有七張美國前 20 張專輯，十張美國爵士專輯排名第一，比美國爵士樂排行榜歷史上任何其他藝術家都多。

康尼克在美國最暢銷的專輯是他 1993 年的聖誕專輯《When My Heart Find Christmas》，這也是美國最暢銷的聖誕專輯之一。他最高的排行榜專輯是他 2004 年發行的 Only You，在美國達到 #5，在英國達到 #6。他曾獲得三項格萊美獎和一項艾美獎。2002 年至 2006 年，他在電視情景喜劇《威爾與格蕾絲》中扮演格蕾絲的丈夫里奧·馬庫斯博士。

康尼克於 1990 年在二戰電影《孟菲斯美女》中以尾炮手的身份開始了他的演藝生涯。他於 1995 年在 Copycat 中扮演聯環殺手，然後在 1996 年的大片《天煞地球反擊戰》中飾演噴氣式戰鬥機飛行員。康尼克的第一個男主角是在 1998 年與桑德拉·布洛克 （Sandra Bullock） 合作的《希望漂浮》中。2007 年，他在《Bug》中扮演暴力的前夫，之後是兩部浪漫喜劇，2007 年的《P.S. 》上映後，他自《模仿者》以來的第一部驚悚電影問世。我愛你，以及 2009 年與蕾妮·齊薇格 （Renée Zellweger） 合作的《New in Town》中的男主角。
data.name: 小哈里·康尼克

data.biography:
Olivia Haigh Williams (born July 26, 1968) is a British actress who has appeared in British and American films and television. Williams studied drama at the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School for two years followed by three years at the Royal Shakespeare Company. Her first significant screen role was as Jane Fairfax in the British television film Emma (1996), based on Jane Austen's novel.

She made her film debut in 1997's The Postman, followed by Rushmore (1998) and The Sixth Sense (1999). Williams also acted in the British films Lucky Break (2001), The Heart of Me (2002) and An Education (2009). She continued acting in films such as The Ghost Writer (2010), Hanna (2011), Anna Karenina (2012), Hyde Park on Hudson (2012), Maps to the Stars (2014), Victoria & Abdul (2017), and The Father (2020).

From 2017 to 2019, she played Emily Silk in the science fiction television series Counterpart. In 2022, Williams portrayed Camilla Parker Bowles in the Netflix historical drama The Crown in its fifth season, a role she is set to reprise in its sixth and final season.
data.name: Olivia Williams

data.biography: Olivia Haigh Williams 1968. július 26-án született Camden Townban, London belvárosában. Szülei ügyvédek. A Newnham Collegen szerzett diplomát angol irodalomból. Ezután két évig drámát tanult a Bristol Old Vic Theatre Schoolban. Három évig kapcsolatban élt Radoslaw Sikorski lengyel külügyminiszterrel. 2003. november 2-án férjhez ment Rhashan Stone színészhez. Két gyermekük született: Esmé Ruby 2004. április 6-án és Roxana May 2007. április 7-én. A diploma után a Royal Shakespeare Company-val dolgozott Londonban és Stratford-upon-Avonban. 1995-ben az Egyesült Államokban turnézott Shakespeare Richard III darabjával. Elsõ jelentõsebb szerepe az Emma címû brit TV-filmben volt 1996-ban, melyben Jane Fairfax-ot alakította. A mû Jane Austen 1816-os novelláján alapult. 1997-ben a mozikban is debütált, amikor megkapta Abby szerepét a The Postman címû filmben. Egy évvel késõbb megkapta a fõszerepet a Rushmore címû vígjátékban. 1999-ben feltûnt Bruce Willis feleségeként a The Sixth Sense címû thrillerben. 2000-ben írt egy rövid történetet The Significance Of Hair címmel, amit felolvasott a BBC Radioban. 2002-ben elnyerte a British Independent Film Awardot legjobb színésznő kategóriában a The Heart Of Me című romantikus drámában nyújtott alakításáért. 2008-ban a Miss Austen Regrets című filmben Jane Austen brit szerzőt alakította. A legutóbbi Peter Pan adaptációban Mrs. Darlingot játszotta. 2006-ban megkapta Dr. Moira MacTaggert szerepét az X-Men: The Last Stand címû filmben. 2009-ben Josh Whedon-tól megkapta Adelle DeWitt szerepét a Dollhouse című sorozatban, ez hozta meg neki a sikert. 2010-ben a The Ghost Writers című misztikus thrillerben és a Longfellow című vígjátékban volt látható. 2011-ben szerepelt a Hanna nevű filmben. 2011-től 2012-ig visszatérő szereplő lett a Case Sensitive sorozatban. 2012-ben olyan híres filmszerepeket kapott, mint a Most jó és az Anna Karenina. Jelenleg 3 filmen is dolgozik, amelyek 2014-ben jelennek majd meg.

奥利维亚·海格·威廉姆斯（Olivia Haigh Williams，1968年7月26日-），英国女演员，曾出演英美电影和电视。威廉姆斯在布里斯托尔老维克戏剧学校学习了两年戏剧，然后在皇家莎士比亚剧团学习了三年。她的第一个重要银幕角色是在英国电视电影《艾玛》（1996）中饰演简·费尔法克斯，该片改编自简·奥斯汀的小说。

她在 1997 年的《邮差》中首次亮相，随后是《拉什莫尔》（1998 年）和《第六感》（1999 年）。威廉姆斯还出演了英国电影《幸运假期》（2001 年）、《我的心》（2002 年）和《教育》（2009 年）。她继续出演《幽灵作家》（2010 年）、《汉娜》（2011 年）、《安娜·卡列尼娜》（2012 年）、《哈德逊河畔海德公园》（2012 年）、《星际地图》（2014 年）、《维多利亚与阿卜杜勒》（2017 年）和《父亲》（2020 年）等电影。

2017年至2019年，她在科幻电视剧《对手》中饰演艾米丽·西尔克。2022 年，威廉姆斯在 Netflix 历史剧《王冠》第五季中饰演卡米拉·帕克·鲍尔斯，她将在第六季也是最后一季中再次扮演这个角色。
data.name: 奥利维亚·威廉姆斯

奧利維亞·海格·威廉姆斯（Olivia Haigh Williams，1968 年 7 月 26 日-），英國女演員，曾出演英美電影和電視。威廉姆斯在布里斯託爾老維克戲劇學校學習了兩年戲劇，然後在皇家莎士比亞劇團學習了三年。她的第一個重要銀幕角色是在英國電視電影《芳心愛漫遊》（1996）中飾演簡·費爾法克斯，該片改編自簡·奧斯汀的小説。

她在 1997 年的《郵差》中首次亮相，隨後是《拉什莫爾》（1998 年）和《鬼眼》（1999 年）。威廉姆斯還出演了英國電影《幸運假期》（2001 年）、《我的心》（2002 年）和《教育》（2009 年）。她繼續出演《幽靈作家》（2010 年）、《殺神少女：漢娜》（2011 年）、《貴族孽緣：安娜．卡列尼娜》（2012 年）、《哈德遜河畔海德公園》（2012 年）、《星際地圖》（2014 年）、《維多利亞與阿卜杜勒》（2017 年）和《爸爸可否不要老》（2020 年）等電影。

2017 年至 2019 年，她在科幻電視劇《伊朗式摔角》中飾演艾米麗·西爾克。2022 年，威廉姆斯在 Netflix 歷史劇《王冠》第五季中飾演卡米拉·帕克·鮑爾斯，她將在第六季也是最後一季中再次扮演這個角色。
data.name: 奧利維亞·威廉姆斯

data.biography:
Olivia Haigh Williams, 26 Temmuz 1968 tarihinde Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Her ikisi de avukat olan bir ailenin kızı olarak dünyaya gelen Williams, Cambridge Üniversitesi'nde İngiliz Edebiyatı bölümünden mezun olduktan sonra Bristol Old Vic Tiyatro Okulu'nda iki yıl drama eğitimi almıştır. Kariyerine sahnede başlayan Williams, Royal Shakespeare Company (RSC) bünyesinde üç yıl boyunca çalışarak klasik tiyatroda sağlam bir temel oluşturdu. Bu dönemde Sir Ian McKellen ile birlikte "III. Richard" oyununun ABD turnesine katıldı.

Televizyon kariyerine 1990'ların başında küçük rollerle başlayan Williams, ilk önemli çıkışını Jane Austen uyarlaması olan "Emma" (1996) TV filmindeki Jane Fairfax rolüyle yaptı. Sinemadaki ilk büyük rolünü ise Kevin Costner'ın yönettiği "Haberci" (The Postman) (1997) filmiyle elde etti. Ancak onu uluslararası alanda tanınır kılan yapımlar, Wes Anderson'ın kült filmi "Çılgın Liseliler" (Rushmore) (1998) ve Bruce Willis ile başrolü paylaştığı, gişe rekorları kıran M. Night Shyamalan filmi "Altıncı His" (The Sixth Sense) (1999) oldu. Bu filmdeki performansıyla geniş kitlelerin beğenisini kazandı.

2000'li yıllar boyunca Williams, hem bağımsız sinemada hem de büyük bütçeli yapımlarda yer alarak çok yönlülüğünü kanıtladı. "The Heart of Me" (2002) filmindeki rolüyle İngiliz Bağımsız Film Ödülleri'nde En İyi Kadın Oyuncu ödülünü kazandı. "Aşk Dersi" (An Education) (2009), "Peter Pan" (2003), "Hanna" (2011), "Anna Karenina" (2012) ve Anthony Hopkins ile birlikte rol aldığı "Baba" (The Father) (2020) gibi eleştirmenlerce beğenilen filmlerde önemli roller üstlendi. Roman Polanski'nin yönettiği "Hayalet Yazar" (The Ghost Writer) (2010) filmindeki performansıyla Ulusal Film Eleştirmenleri Derneği ve Londra Film Eleştirmenleri Birliği tarafından En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu seçildi.

Televizyon dünyasında da aktif bir kariyere sahip olan Williams, Joss Whedon'ın bilimkurgu dizisi "Dollhouse" (2009-2010) ile adından söz ettirdi. Ayrıca "Counterpart" (2017-2019), "The Nevers" (2021) gibi dizilerde ve özellikle son dönemde büyük beğeni toplayan "The Crown" (2022-2023) dizisinde canlandırdığı Camilla Parker Bowles karakteriyle hafızalara kazındı. Güçlü sahne geçmişi, zarafeti ve canlandırdığı karakterlere kattığı derinlikle günümüzün en saygın İngiliz aktrislerinden biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

data.biography:
Hanna Mangan-Lawrence (born 5 March 1991 in London, England) is an Australian and British actress, best known in Australia for her role as Holly in the drama series Bed of Roses in which she received an AFI Award nomination in 2008 and a Logie Award nomination in 2009, and internationally as Seppia in the Starz historical drama Spartacus: Vengeance.

Mangan-Lawrence started her film career in 2005 with the short films, Simulation 1201 and Galore. This was followed by a starring role as Georgie, in the short film Sexy Thing, which was accepted into the Cannes Film Festival.

Mangan-Lawrence was the cast in the 2008 horror film, Acolytes, directed by John Hewitt, premièred at the 2008 Toronto Film Festival. In Acolytes, she played the role of Chasely, a naive and coquettish high school student. She subsequently featured in Nash Edgerton's film, The Square, as Lily. She was nominated for a Filmink award for 'Best Australian Newcomer' for this performance.

In 2009, she appeared in the Australian period drama, Lucky Country, directed by Kriv Stenders.

Mangan-Lawrence has featured in the Australian drama series, Bed of Roses, which screened on the ABC television network, playing Holly Atherton. In 2008, she received an AFI Award nomination for "Best Guest or Supporting Actress in a Television Drama" for her role in Bed of Roses She was also nominated for the 'Graham Kennedy Award For Most Outstanding New Talent' at the Logie Awards in 2009.

In 2012, Mangan-Lawrence starred in the feature-film, Thirst alongside Myles Pollard, Victoria Haralabidou, and Tom Green. She also became a recurring cast member, Seppia, on the Starz television series, Spartacus: Vengeance.

Mangan-Lawrence is the daughter of Maggie Mangan, an English teacher and playwright, and her father is Ray Lawrence a geography, economics and business studies teacher. She has a half-sister Rosene, two half-brothers Liam and Reuben, a stepsister Zoe and stepmother Paddy, also a teacher. She has represented Australia overseas as a member of the elite gymnastics team. In 2005, she won "Acrobat of the Year – International – Senior" at the Gymnastics Australia National Awards. In 2009, Mangan-Lawrence completed her high school education at the Newtown High School of the Performing Arts through Pathways.
data.name: Hanna Mangan Lawrence

data.biography:
Mangan-Lawrence urodziła się 5 marca 1991 roku. Jest córką nauczycielki i dramatopisarki Maggie Mangan, ma siostrę Rosene i brata Liama. Reprezentowała Australię za granicą jako członek elitarnej drużyny gimnastycznej.

W 2005 zdobyła tytuł międzynarodowej akrobatki roku w Australii. W 2009 roku Mangan-Lawrence zakończyła edukację w szkole średniej the Newtown High School of the Performing Arts.

Zaczynała karierę w roku 2005 w filmach krótkometrażowych, a jeden z nich "Sexy Thing" został wyróżniony na festiwalu w Cannes. Pierwszy jej pełnometrażowy film to "Akolici" który miał premierę w 2008 roku na festiwalu w Toronto.

data.overview: Một người đàn ông của gia đình bị đưa đến nhà tù sau khi gây ra tai nạn giao thông chết người. Một thương gia thành công Jacob Harlon (Nicolaj Coster Waldau) đã trở thành một tay găng tơ tàn nhẫn trong nhà tù. Khi bước vào ngôi nhà mới đầy tàn bạo, anh phải thích nghi với các quy tắc và nghi lễ truyền thống của những tù nhân ở đây tạo ra để có thể đảm bảo sự sống còn cho mình. Anh dần dần mất đi bản chất lương thiện và các mối quan hệ trong cuộc sống trước kia bao gồm cả vợ và con trai của mình. Sự kìm kẹp trong gia đình mới của anh và những nhóm tù nhân đã trải dài ra ngoài bức tường của nhà tù. Khi được giải thoát anh vẫn bị theo dõi bởi các cơ quan pháp luật và bị đe dọa bởi những tên tội phạm trong tù trước đây. Jacob đã phải dàn dựng lên một tội ác nguy hiểm cuối cùng. Quá trình tàn nhẫn để hoàn thành nghĩa vụ của mình cũng trở thành con đường dẫn đến sự hy sinh, trả thù và nhìn nhận lại bản thân...

data.biography: Viva Bianca urodziła się jako Viva Skubiszewski w Australii w 1983 roku. Jest córką słynnego kompozytora filmowego Cezarego Skubiszewskiego, który wyemigrował z Polski do Australii w 1974 roku. Jej matka Lee jest nauczycielką i malarką. Ma o rok starszego brata Jana, który studiował fotografie i jest kompozytorem oraz producentem w branży Hip-Hop i idąc w ślady ojca komponuje także muzykę filmową. Viva dorastała na terenach wiejskich w stanie Victoria ale w 1989 roku ze względu na karierę ojca jej rodzina przeprowadziła się do Melbourne. Gdy chodziła do szkoły w Melbourne nie przykładała większej uwagi do przewijających się przez jej dom producentów, reżyserów i aktorów, którzy przychodzili spotkać się z jej ojcem. Ponieważ oboje rodzice są artystami jej chęć zostania aktorką została przyjęta z dużą radością. W 2005 roku ukończyła "Western Australia Academy of Performing Arts'. Już w czasie studiów występowała gościnnie w kilku Australijskich serialach takich jak "Marshall Law", "Policjanci z Mt. Thomas" (Blue Heelers), "Eugenie Sandler P.I.". Viva występuje także w teatrze. W 2009 roku zagrała w filmie "Accidents Happen" jako Becky oraz "Bad Bush" jako Aphelia. Na początku 2010 roku rozpoczęła regularne występy w serialu "Spartacus: Blood and Sand" jako Ilithyia. Tą rolą zdobyła nową rzesze wielbicieli na całym świecie.

Park Hee-von (born Park Jae-young; May 11, 1983) is a South Korean actress, singer and model. Park made her entertainment debut in 2001 as a member of a girl group named M.I.L.K. under S.M. Entertainment's short-lived subsidiary BM Entertainment. The quartet released one album titled With Freshness, and disbanded less than two years later. When Park transitioned to acting, she began using the stage name Park Hee-von. Park is best known for starring in independent films and cable TV series.

data.biography: Noah Taylor (born September 4, 1969) is an Australian actor. Born to Australian parents in London, Taylor migrated to Australia at age five. He left school at 16, and began his acting career in amateur theater. He is best known for his roles as teenage David Helfgott in Shine, Locke in the HBO series Game of Thrones, Darby Sabini in the BBC One series Peaky Blinders, Mr. Bucket in Charlie and the Chocolate Factory and Danny in the Australian cult film He Died with a Felafel in His Hand.

Noah George Taylor (* 4. September 1969 in London, England) ist ein australischer Filmschauspieler.

Noah Taylor wurde 1969 in London geboren. 1974 zog er zusammen mit seiner Familie nach Australien. Nach Abschluss der High School begann Taylor mit der Schauspielerei. Für seinen ersten Film Das Jahr meiner ersten Liebe wurde er für einen AFI Award nominiert. Sein internationaler Durchbruch gelang ihm an der Seite von Armin Mueller-Stahl und Geoffrey Rush in Shine – Der Weg ins Licht.

Leszek Piskorz (ur. 14 maja 1947 w Krakowie) – polski aktor teatralny, filmowy i telewizyjny, pedagog.

Absolwent VIII Liceum Ogólnokształcącego im. Stanisława Wyspiańskiego w Krakowie z 1965. W 1970 ukończył Państwową Wyższą Szkołę Teatralną im. Ludwika Solskiego w Krakowie. Związał się ze Starym Teatrem im. Heleny Modrzejewskiej, w którym w ciągu 25 lat pracy zawodowej zagrał ok. 70 ról. Występował również w Teatrze Telewizji, serialach i filmach. Ma także osiągnięcia reżyserskie. Jest profesorem PWST w Krakowie oraz Szkoły Teatralnej przy Uniwersytecie Wisconsin of Milwaukee w Stanach Zjednoczonych. [Wikipedia]
data.name: Leszek Piskorz

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Ronald Winston Yuan is an American actor, martial artist, director, and stunt choreographer. He is best known for his roles on Sons of Anarchy, Prison Break, Golden Boy, and CSI: NY. He has acted in numerous films, including an ensemble lead as Sgt. Qiang in Disney's live-action adaptation Mulan. He also supplied the voice of Sgt. Fideltin Rusk in the video game series Star Wars: The Old Republic, and Scorpion in Mortal Kombat 11.

袁文忠（Ron Yuan），美籍华裔演员、导演、动作导演。出生于纽约，从小对戏剧表演充满热爱，18岁时参加经典非裔美国话剧《阳光下的葡萄干》(A Raisin in the Sun) 试戏，作为亚裔演员被作者Lorraine Hansberry破格录用，饰演Walter一角，从此坚定了表演信念，开始在洛杉矶发展。代表作品包括：《花木兰》(2020)、《马可波罗》第二季 (2016)、《混乱之子》第七季 (2014)、《金童》(2013)、《速度与激情4》(2009)、《越狱》第四季(2008)、《犯罪现场调查：纽约》第二季 (2005) 等。

除了在台前表演之外，袁文忠也是一名导演和动作导演，代表作品包括：《舞出我人生之舞所不能》(2019)、《怒火保镖》(2015)、《痞子英雄2：黎明升起》(2014)、《黑色炸药》(2009) 等。袁文忠极富磁性的声音也塑造了不少经典游戏和动画形象，如《真人快打11》中的蝎子 (Scorpion)、《红色警戒3》中的达郎将军 (Tatsu) 等。袁文忠从小习武，精通咏春、洪拳、极真空手道 、泰拳等。
data.name: 袁文忠

袁文忠（Ron Yuan），美籍華裔演員、導演、動作導演。出生於紐約，從小對戲劇表演充滿熱愛，18 歲時參加經典非裔美國話劇《陽光下的葡萄乾》(A Raisin in the Sun) 試戲，作為亞裔演員被作者 Lorraine Hansberry 破格錄用，飾演 Walter 一角，從此堅定了表演信念，開始在洛杉磯發展。代表作品包括：《花木蘭 1998》(2020)、《馬可波羅》第二季 (2016)、《混亂之子》第七季 (2014)、《金童》(2013)、《狂野時速 4》(2009)、《越獄》第四季 (2008)、《犯罪現場調查：紐約》第二季 (2005) 等。

除了在台前表演之外，袁文忠也是一名導演和動作導演，代表作品包括：《舞出我人生之舞所不能》(2019)、《百搭牌》(2015)、《痞子英雄 2：黎明升起》(2014)、《黑色炸藥》(2009) 等。袁文忠極富磁性的聲音也塑造了不少經典遊戲和動畫形象，如《真人快打 11》中的蠍子 (Scorpion)、《紅色警戒 3》中的達郎將軍 (Tatsu) 等。袁文忠從小習武，精通詠春、洪拳、極真空手道 、泰拳等。
data.name: 袁文忠

Mel Lisboa Alves (born January 17, 1982) is a Brazilian actress and presenter. She became known for the character Anita of Anita's Presence.  became known for playing the title character in the miniseries Presença de Anita (2001).

She is the daughter of astrologer Cláudia Lisboa Alves and musician Bebeto Alves. She is the cousin of comedian Rafinha Bastos. She studied cinema at the Universidade Federal Fluminense (UFF), in Niterói, but dropped out of the course to pursue a career as an actress. She is not directly related to the Gaucho musician Nei Lisboa. In 2009, the actress declared that she was an atheist in an interview with Tpm magazine.  She debuted as an actress in 2001, starring in the Rede Globo miniseries, Presença de Anita, playing Anita, a mysterious and seductive young woman. Due to her character's great sexual appeal, she participated in a sensual shoot for the website Paparazzo. The miniseries earned an average of 30 ratings and was rebroadcast in full in 2002 on TV Globo. In 2002, in the soap opera Escolhas de Mulher , she played Gabriela, a young woman from the countryside and aspiring model. This time her character was not as successful, due to the fixed image of the previous character and the plot's low ratings. The actress, at the time, even realized that she had been dazzled after playing a prominent role, but after playing another with little acceptance, she matured. In 2003, he did his second sensual shoot. This time for Trip magazine. The following year she posed nude for the Brazilian edition of Playboy magazine, in its 29th anniversary edition. In the same year, after having signed a contract with SBT, the contract did not go through, she returned to Rede Globo and acted in the soap opera Como uma Onda, playing Lenita Paiva, a rich and spoiled girl. In 2006, she became a television presenter on the GNT/Rede Globo Sat channel and released the book Mundo Afora — Diário de Bordo de Mel Lisboa, with the plot and photographs of her program. In 2007, she participated in the cast of the soap opera Sete Pecados, in which she played the character Carla, a young woman of humble origins and extremely ambitious with her dubious personality.

On April 1, 2010, she signed a contract with Rede Record and the following year she starred in the miniseries Sansão e Dalila, playing Dalila, a seductive woman with a dubious character. Still in 2011, she participated in two more sensual shoots: In Inked magazine, she shows her tattoos and talks about her passion for them. In Maxim magazine, she shows that the lolita phase is literally behind her. She won some awards in her career, including the most important national cinema award, the Kikito, at the Gramado Festival, as best actress for her performance in Sonhos e Deseios, in 2006. In cinema, she participated in films such as A Fortune Teller (The Fortune Teller ). 2003), The Wedding of Romeo and Juliet (2005), Dreams and Desires (2006), and Live (2008). In theater he participated in plays such as Há Vaga Para Moças de Fino Trato (2002), Confessões de Adolescente (2003), Brutal (2003), Luluzinhas (2003), Biting the Lips (2006), A Mulher do Candidato (2008), Cyrano (2009), After the Rain (2010) and Altered Women (2010/2011). In October 2012, she was hospitalized with an intestinal virus and had to cancel the show.
data.name: Mel Lisboa

Mel Lisboa Alves é uma atriz e apresentadora brasileira. Ficou conhecida pela personagem Anita de Presença de Anita.

É filha da astróloga Cláudia Lisboa Alves e do músico Bebeto Alves. Estudou cinema na Universidade Federal Fluminense (UFF), em Niterói, mas trancou o curso para seguir a carreira de atriz. Não possui nenhum grau de parentesco direto com o músico gaúcho Nei Lisboa. Em 2009, a atriz declarou ser ateia em uma entrevista dada a revista Tpm.

data.biography:
Essie Davis is an Australian actress. Born and raised in Hobart, Tasmania, she is the daughter of locally famed artist George Davis. She emerged from the Old Nick Company at the University of Tasmania in the late 1980s and has gone on to appear in Hollywood movies. She is a graduate of the National Institute of Dramatic Art (NIDA) in Sydney.

Her career started after her role in the all Australian movie Dad and Dave: On Our Selection (1995), also starring other prestigious actors such as Geoffrey Rush, Leo McKern, and Joan Sutherland. Her most famous movie roles are in The Matrix Reloaded and The Matrix Revolutions, Richard Flanagan's 1998 Tasmanian film The Sound of One Hand Clapping, and Girl with a Pearl Earring.

In 2003 she won the Laurence Olivier Award for Best Supporting Actress for her UK performance in the Tennessee Williams play A Streetcar Named Desire. In 2004 she starred in a Broadway production of Tom Stoppard's Jumpers, for which she earned a Tony nomination. In 2005 she appeared as Mrs. Nellie Lovett in the BBC production of Sweeney Todd with Ray Winstone. In the 2008 film Hey, Hey, It's Esther Blueburger she plays Esther's controlling mother.
data.name: Essie Davis

data.biography:
Esther „Essie“ Davis (* 19. Januar 1970 in Hobart, Tasmanien) ist eine australische Schauspielerin.

In ihrer Jugend wirkte sie als Sängerin in Schülerbands mit, ehe sie sich der Schauspielerei zuwandte.  Während sie vermehrt in australischen Theaterproduktionen erschien, feierte Davis 1993 ihr Filmdebüt mit einer Nebenrolle in John Dingwalls Drama Doppeltes Spiel. Es folgten größere Filmrollen wie in Tony Mahoods Drama River Street (1996), dem Fernsehfilm The Ripper (1997), sowie Auftritte in australischen Fernsehserien. Im Jahr 2001 wurde Davis für ihre Rolle in Mark Pipers Fernsehfilm Halifax f.p: The Spider and the Fly vom Australian Film Institute als Beste Hauptdarstellerin in einem Fernsehfilm oder Fernsehmehrteiler nominiert.

2003 erschien Essie Davis in der Rolle der eifersüchtigen Gattin von Jan Vermeer (gespielt von Colin Firth) in Peter Webbers Kostümdrama Das Mädchen mit dem Perlenohrring. Der Film errang die Gunst der Kritiker und war 2004 in mehreren Kategorien für den Oscar, Golden Globe Award und British Academy Film Award nominiert. Zu ihren weiteren Filmrollen zählen u. a. der Part der Maggie in Matrix Reloaded und Matrix Revolutions (beide 2003), sowie die weiblichen Hauptrollen in den beiden Fernsehfilmen Sweeney Todd und The Silence (beide 2006). 2006 spielte Davis die Filmmutter von Dakota Fanning in Schweinchen Wilbur und seine Freunde, in dem so bekannte Schauspielkollegen wie Julia Roberts, Oprah Winfrey, Kathy Bates oder Robert Redford Sprechrollen übernahmen. 2007 war sie neben Toni Collette in der australischen Filmproduktion Hey, Hey, It's Esther Blueburger zu sehen, ein Jugenddrama über ein 13-jähriges Mädchen (gespielt von Keisha Castle-Hughes), das versucht, in einer angesehenen Privatschule und zugleich einer öffentlichen Schule Anschluss zu finden.

Nach Nebenrollen in australischen Filmen wie Australia (2008) oder Burning Man (2011; Nominierung für den Film Critics Circle of Australia-Award) trat Davis vornehmlich in australischen Fernsehproduktionen in Erscheinung. Für den Part der Dolly Prickles in dem Mehrteiler Cloud Street, der zwei australische Familien aus der Arbeiterklasse über einen Zeitraum von 20 Jahren von den 1940er bis 1960er Jahren begleitet, erhielt sie eine Nominierung für den australischen AACTA Award als beste Hauptdarstellerin. Von 2012 bis 2015 spielt sie die Titelrolle in der Detektivserie Miss Fishers mysteriöse Mordfälle in bisher 3 Staffeln, die auf den Kriminalromanen von Kerry Greenwood basieren.

艾茜·戴维斯（Essie Davis）是澳大利亚女演员。她在塔斯马尼亚州霍巴特出生和长大，是当地著名艺术家乔治戴维斯的女儿。她于 1980 年代后期从塔斯马尼亚大学的 Old Nick Company 崭露头角，并继续出现在好莱坞电影中。她毕业于悉尼国立戏剧艺术学院（NIDA）。她的职业生涯始于她在全澳大利亚电影《爸爸和戴夫：我们的选择》（1995 年）中的角色，该片还由杰弗里·拉什、里奥·麦肯和琼·萨瑟兰等其他著名演员主演。她最著名的电影角色是《黑客帝国重装上阵》和《黑客帝国革命》、理查德·弗拉纳根 1998 年在塔斯马尼亚拍摄的电影《一只手拍手的声音》和《戴珍珠耳环的女孩》。2003年，她因在田纳西州威廉姆斯戏剧《欲望号街车》中的英国表演而获得劳伦斯·奥利弗奖最佳女配角奖。2004年，她出演了百老汇制作的汤姆·斯托帕德（Tom Stoppard）的《跳线》（Jumpers），并因此获得了托尼奖提名。2005年，她与雷·温斯通（Ray Winstone）一起在BBC制作的《斯威尼·托德》（Sweeney Todd）中饰演内莉·洛维特（Nellie Lovett）夫人。在 2008 年的电影《嘿，嘿，这是埃丝特·布鲁伯格》中，她扮演埃丝特的控制欲强的母亲。她最近与妮可·基德曼和休·杰克曼一起完成了由巴兹·鲁尔曼执导的电影《澳大利亚》的拍摄。2008年，戴维斯在墨尔本剧院公司的《热铁皮屋顶上的猫》中扮演玛姬。2008年，她回到塔斯马尼亚州成立了“塔斯马尼亚剧团”，帮助支持当地戏剧，同时鼓励年轻人继续参与艺术活动。
data.name: 艾茜·戴维斯

data.biography: 艾茜·戴維斯（Essie Davis）是澳大利亞女演員。她在塔斯馬尼亞州霍巴特出生和長大，是當地著名藝術家喬治戴維斯的女兒。她於 1980 年代後期從塔斯馬尼亞大學的 Old Nick Company 嶄露頭角，並繼續出現在好萊塢電影中。她畢業於悉尼國立戲劇藝術學院（NIDA）。她的職業生涯始於她在全澳大利亞電影《爸爸和戴夫：我們的選擇》（1995 年）中的角色，該片還由傑弗裏·拉什、里奧·麥肯和瓊·薩瑟蘭等其他著名演員主演。她最著名的電影角色是《黑客帝國重裝上陣》和《黑客帝國革命》、理查德·弗拉納根 1998 年在塔斯馬尼亞拍攝的電影《一隻手拍手的聲音》和《戴珍珠耳環的女孩》。2003 年，她因在田納西州威廉姆斯戲劇《慾海奇女子》中的英國表演而獲得勞倫斯·奧利弗獎最佳女配角獎。2004 年，她出演了百老匯製作的湯姆·斯託帕德（Tom Stoppard）的《跳線》（Jumpers），並因此獲得了託尼獎提名。2005 年，她與雷·温斯通（Ray Winstone）一起在 BBC 製作的《斯威尼·託德》（Sweeney Todd）中飾演內莉·洛維特（Nellie Lovett）夫人。在 2008 年的電影《嘿，嘿，這是埃絲特·布魯伯格》中，她扮演埃絲特的控制慾強的母親。她最近與妮可·基德曼和休·傑克曼一起完成了由巴茲·魯爾曼執導的電影《澳大利亞》的拍攝。2008 年，戴維斯在墨爾本劇院公司的《熱鐵皮屋頂上的貓》中扮演瑪姬。2008 年，她回到塔斯馬尼亞州成立了“塔斯馬尼亞劇團”，幫助支持當地戲劇，同時鼓勵年輕人繼續參與藝術活動。
data.name: 艾茜·戴維斯

data.biography: Essie Davis jest australijską aktorką. Urodzona i wychowana w Hobart w Tasmanii, jest córką lokalnie znanego artysty George'a Davisa. Wystąpiła w Old Nick Company na Uniwersytecie Tasmańskim pod koniec lat 80. i pojawiła się w hollywoodzkich filmach. Jest absolwentką Narodowego Instytutu Sztuki Dramatycznej (NIDA) w Sydney. Jej kariera rozpoczęła się po roli w australijskim filmie Dad and Dave: On Our Selection (1995), w którym wystąpili także inni znani aktorzy, tacy jak Geoffrey Rush, Leo McKern i Joan Sutherland. Jej najsłynniejsze role filmowe to Matrix Reaktywacja i Matrix Rewolucje, tasmański film Richarda Flanagana z 1998 roku Dźwięk jednej ręki klaskającej i Dziewczyna z perłą. W 2003 roku zdobyła nagrodę Laurence'a Oliviera dla najlepszej aktorki drugoplanowej za występ w brytyjskiej sztuce Tennessee Williamsa Tramwaj zwany pożądaniem. W 2004 roku zagrała w broadwayowskiej produkcji „Jumpers” Toma Stopparda, za którą otrzymała nominację do nagrody Tony. W 2005 roku zagrała rolę pani Nellie Lovett w produkcji BBC „Sweeney Todd” z Rayem Winstonem. W filmie „Hey, Hey, It's Esther Blueburger” z 2008 roku wcieliła się w rolę dominującej matki Esther.

Esther "Essie" Davis, 19 Ocak 1970 tarihinde Hobart, Tasmanya, Avustralya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Sanatçı bir babanın kızı olarak dünyaya gelen Davis, genç yaşta sanatla iç içe büyüdü. Lise eğitiminin ardından Avustralya'nın en prestijli drama okullarından biri olan Ulusal Dramatik Sanatlar Enstitüsü'ne (NIDA) girdi ve buradan 1992 yılında mezun oldu. Cate Blanchett gibi isimlerle aynı dönemde eğitim aldığı bu kurum, onun profesyonel oyunculuk kariyerinin temelini attı.

Kariyerine tiyatro sahnesinde başlayan Davis, Bell Shakespeare Company gibi saygın topluluklarla çalışarak "Romeo ve Juliet" ve "Hamlet" gibi klasik oyunlarda önemli roller üstlendi. Sahnedeki güçlü performansları, ona Avustralya'da tanınmış bir tiyatro oyuncusu kimliği kazandırdı. Sinemaya geçişi ise 1990'ların ortalarında başladı ve "Dad and Dave: On Our Selection" (1995) gibi Avustralya yapımı filmlerde rol aldı. Uluslararası alanda ise Wachowski Kardeşler'in "Matrix Reloaded" (2003) ve "Matrix Revolutions" (2003) filmlerindeki küçük ama dikkat çeken rolüyle ilk kez boy gösterdi.

Essie Davis'i küresel bir yıldıza dönüştüren ve kariyerinin en ikonik rollerinden birini sunan yapım, 2012-2015 yılları arasında yayınlanan "Miss Fisher'ın Cinayet Gizemleri" (Miss Fisher's Murder Mysteries) adlı televizyon dizisi oldu. 1920'lerde Melbourne'de geçen dizide, aristokrat, göz alıcı ve korkusuz özel dedektif Phryne Fisher karakterine hayat verdi. Bu rolüyle dünya çapında büyük bir hayran kitlesi edindi ve karakterle adeta bütünleşti. Dizinin başarısının ardından aynı rolü "Miss Fisher and the Crypt of Tears" (2020) adlı filmde de canlandırdı.

Kariyerindeki bir diğer önemli dönüm noktası ise Jennifer Kent'in yönettiği ve eleştirmenlerden tam not alan psikolojik korku filmi "Karabasan" (The Babadook) (2014) oldu. Kederli ve sorunlu bir anneyi canlandırdığı bu filmdeki performansı, uluslararası alanda büyük övgü topladı ve ona AACTA Ödülleri'nde En İyi Kadın Oyuncu ödülünü getirdi. Bu film, onun dramatik rollerdeki derinliğini ve gücünü tüm dünyaya kanıtladı.

Bu başarıların ardından, popüler kültür fenomeni haline gelen "Game of Thrones" (2016) dizisinin altıncı sezonunda Leydi Crane karakterini canlandırarak Hollywood'daki yerini daha da sağlamlaştırdı. Ayrıca eşi Justin Kurzel'in yönettiği "Kelly Çetesi'nin Gerçek Tarihi" (True History of the Kelly Gang) (2019) ve eleştirmenlerce beğenilen "Bebek Dişleri" (Babyteeth) (2019) gibi filmlerde de önemli roller üstlendi. Guillermo del Toro'nun antoloji serisi "Cabinet of Curiosities" (2022) ve "Nitram" (2021) gibi projelerle farklı türlerdeki yeteneğini sergilemeye devam etmektedir. Yönetmen Justin Kurzel ile evli olan Davis'in ikiz çocukları vardır.

data.biography:
Thelma Ritter (* 14. Februar 1902 in New York City, New York; † 4. Februar 1969 ebenda) war eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin. Sie machte sich ab Ende der 1940er-Jahre einen Namen als Charakterdarstellerin und trat vorwiegend als prägnante Nebendarstellerin in Erscheinung. Sie verkörperte häufig Frauen fortgeschrittenen Alters, die durch ihren schnoddrigen Humor auffallen.  Als Filmschauspielerin trat sie erstmals 1947 in Das Wunder von Manhattan in Erscheinung. Sie war mehrfach für die begehrtesten Film- und Schauspielpreise nominiert, so unter anderem für den Oscar, den Golden Globe und den Emmy, aber nur einmal erhielt sie tatsächlich eine solche Auszeichnung, einen Tony Award. Daher wird Ritter häufig in einem Atemzug genannt mit Deborah Kerr, diejenige Schauspielerin, die am häufigsten für einen Preis vorgeschlagen wurde, ohne jemals einen zu gewinnen. Mit sechs Nominierungen hält sie bis heute den Rekord, am häufigsten bei den Oscars in der Kategorie Beste Nebendarstellerin nominiert worden zu sein, doch gewinnen konnte sie ihn nie. Schauspielerin Ritter kommentierte dies mit den folgenden Worten: „Nun weiß ich, wie es sich anfühlt, immer die Brautjungfer und niemals die Braut zu sein.“

Dem heutigen Publikum ist Thelma Ritter wohl vor allem bekannt durch ihre Rollen als Krankenschwester des von James Stewart gespielten L.B. Jeff Jefferies in Das Fenster zum Hof (1954), als beflissenes Dienstmädchen von Margo Channing (Bette Davis) in Alles über Eva (1950) und als trinkfeste Haushälterin Alma von Doris Day in Bettgeflüster (1959). In all diesen Rollen stach sie durch ihre Schlagfertigkeit und ihre schnoddrige Art hervor. Neben diesen eher komödiantisch geprägten Rollen spielte sie jedoch auch sehr ernste Rollen, etwa als alternde Prostituierte und Polizeinformantin, die nichts mehr von ihrem Leben erwartet, in Samuel Fullers Polizei greift ein (1953) und in der Rolle einer etwas vereinsamten Freundin von Marilyn Monroes Figur in John Hustons Misfits – Nicht gesellschaftsfähig (1961).

Thelma Ritter (Brooklyn, Nova Iorque, 14 de fevereiro de 1902 – Nova Iorque, Nova Iorque, 5 de fevereiro de 1969) foi uma atriz estadunidense de cinema, televisão e teatro. Em sua carreira, Ritter recebeu seis indicações ao Oscar (todas na categoria de atriz coadjuvante), o que faz dela a atriz com o maior número de indicações sem jamais ter ganhado o prêmio, ao lado de Deborah Kerr e Glenn Close. O ator com mais indicações sem jamais ter ganhado é Peter O'Toole. Entretanto, Keer e O'Toole receberam prêmios honorários, ao contrário de Ritter.

Thelma Ritter  (Brooklyn, Nova York, 14 de febrer de 1905 − Nova York, 5 de febrer de 1969) va ser una actriu estatunidenca. Després d'aparèixer en obres de teatre juvenils, va rebre classes d'interpretació en l'American Academy of Dramatic Arts. Va estar treballant en els escenaris fins que va decidir formar una família, encara que anys més tard va tornar a interpretar, ja a començaments dels anys 1940. Al llarg de la seva carrera, Ritter va ser nominada sis vegades als Oscar, encara que mai no en va rebre cap.

data.biography: Verne Troyer (January 1, 1969 – April 21, 2018) was an actor best known for his role as "Mini-Me," Dr. Evil's smaller and more concentrated pure evil protégé, in the hit comedy Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me (1999) and Austin Powers in Goldmember (2002). Even though Verne has become recognized as a "Big Man in the business," he has been working in show business as an actor and stuntman for several years. Troyer, born in Sturgis, Michigan, had always dreamed growing up of getting into showbiz. Shortly after his high school graduation in 1987, Verne moved with some friends to Arlington, Texas, where, in 1993, he got his first break into showbiz as a stunt double for a 9-month-old baby on a film called Baby's Day Out (1994). Over the next few years, Verne made several film and television appearances, often portraying animals or small children.

data.biography: Rob Morrow (born September 21, 1962) is an American actor and director. He is known for his portrayal of Dr. Joel Fleischman on Northern Exposure (1990-1995), a role that garnered him three Golden Globe and two Emmy nominations for Best Actor in a Dramatic Series. Aside from that, Morrow is also known for his role as Ben in the film Private Resort (1985), his role as Richard Goodwin in the film Quiz Show (1994) and his role as FBI agent Don Eppes on the television series, NUMB3RS (2005-2010).
data.name: Rob Morrow

data.biography:
Rob Morrow est un acteur, réalisateur, scénariste et producteur américain né le 21 septembre 1962 à Nouvelle-Rochelle (New York, États-Unis).

Rob Morrow commence sa carrière de comédien dans les années 80 avec de petites apparitions dans des séries comme Fame ou Monsters. Très vite, le succès le rattrape grâce à la série plusieurs fois récompensée Bienvenue en Alaska (Northern Exposure) en 1990. Il y joue le Dr Joel Fleishman, un médecin fraîchement diplômé envoyé en Alaska. Son interprétation lui vaudra trois nominations aux Golden Globes et deux nominations aux Emmy Awards.

Après l’arrêt de la série en 1996, Rob Morrow va participer à plusieurs reprises au Saturday Night Live, une émission américaine culte. Il se tournera plutôt vers le cinéma avec des rôles dans Quiz Show de Robert Redford en 1994 ou Le Gourou et les Femmes en 2001.

Parallèlement, Rob se fait connaître en tant que réalisateur dès 1993 avec le film The Silent Alarm. En 2000, il va plus loin en écrivant le scénario, réalisant et produisant son film Maze. Depuis, il multiplie les réalisations d’épisodes de série télé, comme Oz ou Le Monde de Joan.

Sa carrière d’acteur connaît un nouvel essor avec la série Street Time (it) en 2002, dont il tient un des rôles principaux et réalise quelques épisodes. Celle-ci raconte le quotidien des policiers chargés des libertés conditionnelles. Après une première saison satisfaisante, elle est arrêtée après le démarrage de la seconde.

En 2004, Rob Morrow participe dès son lancement à la série policière Numb3rs, produite par Ridley Scott et Tony Scott. Il s’agit de l’histoire d’un agent du FBI joué par Rob, dont le frère est un génie des mathématiques. Ce dernier l’aide à résoudre ses enquêtes grâce à des calculs scientifiques. À l’occasion il arrive à Rob de réaliser certains épisodes.

Robert Alan Morrow és un actor i director nord-americà. És conegut per la seva interpretació del doctor Joel Fleischman a Northern Exposure, un paper que li va valer tres nominacions als Globus d'Or i dues als Emmy al millor actor en una sèrie dramàtica, i més tard pel seu paper d'agent de l'FBI Don Eppes a Numb3rs.

文峰，美国好莱坞亚裔男演员。他的演艺生涯始于Universal Pictures的电影《街头霸王》；随后在更多的动作电影及电影剧中演出，包括《泪眼煞星》、《变种元素》、《野兽之腹》等，以出演动作片而成名。之后在曾成功转型演出剧情片，与李察·基尔合演《红角落》，之后更与周润发及马克·沃尔伯格演出《再战边缘》，也演出《双狙人3 》，最近的电影作品则是2011年的《铁拳无敌》 ，与罗素·克劳、刘玉玲、吴彦祖、刘家辉、陈观泰等共同合作演出。

文峰同时也活跃于电视剧的演出，曾与杰西卡·阿尔芭在电视剧《末路黑天使》中合作，其他作品包括与曾志伟合演的《龙在他乡》；洪金宝主演的《过江龙》以及《超人前传》等。

Elizabeth Ann Warren (née Herring; born June 22, 1949) is an American politician and former law professor who is the senior United States senator from the state of Massachusetts, serving since 2013. A member of the Democratic Party and regarded as a progressive,[2] Warren has focused on consumer protection, equitable economic opportunity, and the social safety net while in the Senate. Warren was a candidate in the 2020 Democratic Party presidential primaries, ultimately finishing third after Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders.

Born and raised in Oklahoma, Warren is a graduate of the University of Houston and Rutgers Law School at Rutgers University–Newark and has taught law at several universities, including the University of Houston, the University of Texas at Austin, the University of Pennsylvania, and Harvard University. Warren has written 12 books and more than 100 articles.  Warren's first foray into public policy began in 1995, when she worked to oppose what eventually became a 2005 act restricting bankruptcy access for individuals. During the late 2000s, her national profile grew after her forceful public stances in favor of more stringent banking regulations after the 2008 financial crisis. She served as chair of the Congressional Oversight Panel of the Troubled Asset Relief Program, and proposed and established the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, for which she served as the first special advisor under President Barack Obama.

In 2012, Warren defeated incumbent Republican Scott Brown and became the first female U.S. senator from Massachusetts. She was reelected by a wide margin in 2018, defeating Republican nominee Geoff Diehl. On February 9, 2019, Warren announced her candidacy in the 2020 United States presidential election. She was briefly considered the front-runner for the Democratic nomination in late 2019, but support for her campaign dwindled. She withdrew from the race on March 5, 2020, after Super Tuesday. She was reelected to a third Senate term in 2024 against Republican nominee John Deaton.

data.biography: Herman Kwan Hoi-San (Chinese: 關海山) (October 23, 1925 in Guangzhou, Guangdong — September 11, 2006) was a Hong Kong actor. his English name was Herman Kwan. Kwan started off as a Cantonese opera actor in street theatre before joining New Voice Opera Troupe (新聲劇團). He also started singing for early Hong Kong film soundtracks and moved on to act in films, mostly adaption of opera in Cantonese. He became famous and acted in many lead roles. When Hong Kong films started to move towards Mandarin, Kwan's career faltered and joined TVB and acted in various roles. Directors and filmmakers rediscovered his talent and cast him in many supporting roles in films. In 2001, Kwan suffered apoplexy attack and was left mute and paralysed. He died in 2006.
data.name: Kwan Hoi-San

data.biography:
關海山 （1925 年 10 月 23 日－2006 年 9 月 11 日），原名關銘覺，又名關寧，人稱“蝦叔”，祖籍廣東南海縣，生於廣州，香港男演員、粵劇老倌。

1976 年加入香港無線電視；1980 年，參演電影《A 計劃》，飾演陸警主管戚幫辦；同年參演電影《辣手神探》；1991 年參演電影《五億探長雷洛傳》，憑藉該片獲得第 11 屆香港電影金像獎最佳男配角和第 28 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳男配角 ；1992 年出演的賀歲電影《家有囍事》；2000 年，出演吳鎮宇執導的電影《自從他來了》 ；同年又在電視劇《京城教一》中飾演譚宗政 ；2001 年參演電視劇《公私戀事多》，飾演唐學濂
data.name: 關海山

data.biography: Nieves Herrero Cerezo​ (nacida en Madrid, España el 23 de marzo de 1957) es una periodista, presentadora de televisión y escritora española.

data.overview: Stephen Fry bắt đầu một cuộc hành trình để khám phá những câu chuyện đằng sau một số loài quái thú tuyệt vời nhất trên thế giới đã truyền cảm hứng cho các huyền thoại và truyền thuyết trong lịch sử, kể chuyện và phim.
data.title: Sinh Vật Huyền Bí: Lịch Sử Tự Nhiên

data.overview: Cốt truyện kể về Công chúa Turandot, người bị nguyền rủa bởi một sức mạnh bí ẩn phát ra từ ba chiếc vòng tay Mazovian được tặng cho cô như một món quà sinh nhật. Những tác động tiêu diệt sự sống của những chiếc vòng này khiến công chúa trở nên độc ác, và dần dần cô mất nhân tính.
data.title: Đồ Lan Đóa: Lời nguyền duyên khởi
